zh.lifeSummary: 當Nichola de Grenville於1280年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾哈普登 洛福時，她的父親John de Grenville38歲，母親Agatha de Burgh33歲。她於大約1301年與Reginald de Hampden , Sir Knight在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1364年在她的家鄉享年84歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nichola de Grenville于1280年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾哈普登 洛福时，她的父亲John de Grenville38岁，母亲Agatha de Burgh33岁。她于大约1301年与Reginald de Hampden , Sir Knight在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1364年在她的家乡享年84岁。

nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Grainville-la-Teinturière in Seine-Maritime, France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Nichola de Grenville was born in 1280, in Hampden Row, Buckinghamshire, England, her father, John de Grenville, was 38 and her mother, Agatha de Burgh, was 33. She married Reginald de Hampden , Sir Knight about 1301, in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1364, in her hometown, at the age of 84.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nichola de Grenville est née en 1280, à Hampden Row, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, John de Grenville, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Agatha de Burgh, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Reginald de Hampden , Sir Knight environ 1301, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1364, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 84 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nichola de Grenville 1280 in Hampden Row, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Grenville 38 und ihre Mutter Agatha de Burgh 33. Sie hat um 1301 in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Reginald de Hampden , Sir Knight geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1364 im Alter von 84 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nichola de Grenville è nata il nel 1280 nel Hampden Row, Buckinghamshire, England, sua padre, John de Grenville, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Agatha de Burgh, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Reginald de Hampden , Sir Knight circa 1301, nel Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1364, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 84 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Nichola de Grenvilleが1280年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアハンプデン ローで生まれた時，父John de Grenvilleは38歳，母Agatha de Burghは33歳であった。約1301年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアでReginald de Hampden , Sir Knightと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1364年に故郷で84歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nichola de Grenville(이)가 1280년 영국 벅잉함실르 함p든 로에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Grenville(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agatha de Burgh(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 대략 1301년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르에서 Reginald de Hampden , Sir Knight(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1364년 그녀의 고향에서 84세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nichola de Grenville nasceu em 1280, em Hampden Row, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Grenville, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Agatha de Burgh, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Reginald de Hampden , Sir Knight aproximadamente 1301, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1364, em sua cidade natal, com 84 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nichola de Grenville родилась в 1280 г. в местности хампден роу, буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Grenville было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Agatha de Burgh, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Reginald de Hampden , Sir Knight около 1301 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1364 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 84 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nichola de Grenville nació en 1280, en Hampden Row, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Grenville, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Agatha de Burgh, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Reginald de Hampden , Sir Knight aproximadamente 1301, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1364, en su pueblo, a la edad de 84 años.
